name: Spendesk Spend Management API
what_it_does: Spendesk REST API for corporate spend management platform. Enables AI agents to manage purchase requests, virtual card issuance, expense reports, supplier invoices, and budget controls; retrieve spend analytics; and integrate spend data with accounting and ERP systems. Spendesk provides finance teams visibility and control over company spending.
use_cases: Creating and managing purchase requests from procurement workflow agents
Retrieving expense and invoice data from accounting integration agents
Monitoring budget utilization from finance operations agents
Syncing spend data with ERP and accounting platforms from integration agents
not_for: Enterprise AP automation for large company (use Basware or Tipalti)
Travel booking without spend management integration
best_when: A SMB or mid-market company using Spendesk wants AI agents to automate purchase approval workflows, retrieve spend data, and sync with accounting systems.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Corporate spend management errors can result in unauthorized purchases or budget overruns. Payment card issuance has financial liability implications.

auth.notes: Spendesk uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Partner integrations use authorization code flow. Scopes control access to specific spend categories. French company with EU-native auth.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free trial available; no permanent free tier
pricing.paid_tiers: Essential, Scale, and Enterprise plans per user per month
pricing.notes: French company (Paris). European spend management leader. API access on paid plans. Partner program for accounting integrations.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth app; documented in developer docs

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Spend management errors can authorize unauthorized purchases
No public MCP server — REST API with OAuth2
French company — EU-only data residency; GDPR native; not suitable for US-only data requirements
PCI-DSS scope: virtual card issuance involves payment card data
Budget controls and approval workflows require understanding Spendesk data model
Multi-currency support — handle currency conversion carefully in reporting
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Corporate spending and payment card data. PCI-DSS, SOC2, GDPR. French company — EU-only data residency. OAuth2 with scopes.

security_score_components.security_notes: Corporate spending and payment card data. PCI-DSS, SOC2, GDPR. French company — EU-only. OAuth2.
